name: q
label: Search Query
help: Product or keyword to search for (min 2 chars).

name: location
label: Location
help: City or place name, e.g. 'Austin, TX'.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: details
label: Details
help: Set true to fetch full description, photos and coordinates per listing (slower, costs more).

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Responses are cached for 24 hours by default. Set false to bypass the cache and always fetch fresh data (default true).
